title: STIG Posture — Cyber Drilldown
description: Analyst drill-down for one collection: pivot posture by STIG, asset and label, then rank failing rules. Live read-only API data.

panels.title: Open findings by severity — $collection
panels.description: Colors match the STIG Manager UI.

panels.title: Review workflow status — $collection
panels.description: Where reviews sit in the workflow.

panels.title: Review ages
panels.description: Review ages, like the STIG Manager UI. Oldest = the least recently evaluated review (stale checks hide risk); Newest = the most recent review result; Updated = the last time anything was touched, including status changes. Shades of one color encode time depth: darkest = Oldest, lightest = Newest.

panels.title: Posture by STIG benchmark
panels.description: Each STIG applied in this collection: coverage, open findings by severity, workflow statuses and per-STIG risk score. Sorted worst-risk first. Columns are filterable.

computed_columns.selector: ((assessmentsHigh > 0 ? (high + assessmentsHigh - assessedHigh) / assessmentsHigh : 0) * 10 + (assessmentsMedium > 0 ? (medium + assessmentsMedium - assessedMedium) / assessmentsMedium : 0) * 4 + (assessmentsLow > 0 ? (low + assessmentsLow - assessedLow) / assessmentsLow : 0) * 1) / 15 * 100

panels.title: Posture by asset
panels.description: Every asset in this collection. Use the Asset deep-dive dashboard (top-right link) for a single asset.

computed_columns.selector: ((assessmentsHigh > 0 ? (high + assessmentsHigh - assessedHigh) / assessmentsHigh : 0) * 10 + (assessmentsMedium > 0 ? (medium + assessmentsMedium - assessedMedium) / assessmentsMedium : 0) * 4 + (assessmentsLow > 0 ? (low + assessmentsLow - assessedLow) / assessmentsLow : 0) * 1) / 15 * 100

panels.title: Posture by label
panels.description: Posture pivoted by collection label (site, OS, department...). An empty label row means assets without labels.

computed_columns.selector: ((assessmentsHigh > 0 ? (high + assessmentsHigh - assessedHigh) / assessmentsHigh : 0) * 10 + (assessmentsMedium > 0 ? (medium + assessmentsMedium - assessedMedium) / assessmentsMedium : 0) * 4 + (assessmentsLow > 0 ? (low + assessmentsLow - assessedLow) / assessmentsLow : 0) * 1) / 15 * 100

panels.title: Top failing rules (most widespread first)
panels.description: Open findings aggregated by rule across the collection — the remediation hit list. 'Failing assets' = how many assets fail this rule. NOTE: the Labels filter does not apply here (the findings API has no label parameter).
